title: very normal blaze pack
description: Changes all aspects of enderman slayer to blaze slayer :)
body:
!! **For best experiences turn pack off when not doing eman** !!

Showcase video: [https://youtu.be/krrM9Sm8GWE](https://youtu.be/krrM9Sm8GWE)

Had some requests to update minedollcat's pack for 1.8.9 that replaced the aspects of end island and voidgloom seraph with crimson isles and inferno demonlord, couldn't find the original pack so i decided to make one

Its suggested that you use the SkyHanni visual words.zip file, which you can find attached to each version or [here](https://www.mediafire.com/file/sg6mrnbf0mvrevh/sh+visual+words.zip/file), this contains a .json which alters the name of the boss, the enemies and the minibosses to the blaze names to make it a bit more immersive. (to use this place it in config/skyhanni) 

[Requires Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[Requires Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures?version=1.21.10&loader=fabric)

[Requires Cartharsis (.cats pack)](https://modrinth.com/mod/catharsis)

Any suggestions / issues dm Vyirv on discord <3
